completed_work: Recorded the admitted evaluation boundary as diagnostic-only and observational.
Prepared SELF_MODEL and tests for admitted plans including PLAN-20260707-0001.
key_decisions: PLAN-20260707-0001 is admitted but not implemented or completed.
The next implementation must evaluate existing diagnostic advisor output only.
Automatic L0 inclusion remains out of scope and requires a separate PLAN/WARRANT.
next_actions: Implement a diagnostic-only evaluation harness/report for manifest-connected L0 discovery advisor suggestions.
open_questions: Which representative context-pack tasks should form the first advisor evaluation corpus?
What thresholds, if any, should later justify proposing automatic L0 inclusion?
risks: Evaluation results may be misread as approval for automatic selection unless the diagnostic-only boundary is preserved.
summary_text: PLAN-20260707-0001 is admitted by WARR-20260707-0001 as a diagnostic-only evaluation slice. The evaluation is intended to measure manifest-connected L0 discovery advisor suggestions on representative context-pack tasks or fixtures before any automatic L0 inclusion or adapter plan is considered. The admitted scope remains observational: no automatic include_l0, no ContextPackManifest.items mutation, no provider prompt or latest-context prompt change, no live retrieval, no external embedding API calls, no production embedding creation, no index or memory-store mutation, no token-budget telemetry or enforcement, no non-none reranking, and no adapter behavior.
